name: Jellyfin Graveyard Analytics
description: Manage your server's afterlife. Identify lifeless media, condemn dead weight to The Chapel, and track your active Visitors.
overview: Advanced storage reclamation and user analytics.

versions.changelog: The Chapel Update: Automated collection branding, thematic iconography, and .NET 9 performance optimizations.
Initial Release: Opening the gates to Graveyard Analytics v1.0.
